gitCommit.subject: perf(magazine): fix useCallback deps in useMagazinePublish — args object + publishing state
gitCommit.body:
perf(magazine): fix useCallback deps in useMagazinePublish — args object + publishing state

ROOT CAUSE (gap found during exaustive validation):
- `args` object passed as useCallback dep was created inline at the call site
  on EVERY render → useCallback identity changed on every render → publish ref
  was never memoized → React.memo on the Publicar button was defeated.
- `publishing` state in deps caused an extra re-creation during publish flow
  (setPublishing(true) → re-render → new publish ref).

FIX:
1. Destructure args in hook signature — deps are now individual primitives/fns.
2. Replace `if (publishing)` state guard with `publishingRef` (useRef) —
   synchronous, no re-render required, removed from useCallback deps.
3. useCallback now stable across renders when publishable/publishFn unchanged.

REGRESSION PROOF:
- U2 (concurrency guard) still works: publishingRef.current is set synchronously
  before the first await, so any concurrent call sees the flag immediately.
- All 8 U1..U8 contracts unchanged — only deps list and guard mechanism changed.
- publishing state is still set for UI (button disabled / spinner).

BEFORE: publish ref recreated on EVERY render (args always new object reference)
AFTER:  publish ref stable until publishable or publishFn actually changes"
